prompt: Facilitate a daily standup for a 9-person team that consistently runs over 15 minutes.
assertions: introduces parking lot for detailed discussions

prompt: Design a retrospective for a team experiencing retro fatigue after 12 sprints.
assertions: creates psychological safety for honest feedback
tracks action item follow-through from previous retros

prompt: Guide sprint planning for a team with 30% capacity reduction due to holidays.
assertions: validates team commitment against reduced capacity
identifies risks from reduced team availability

prompt: Organize sprint review for executives who have never attended an agile ceremony.
assertions: adapts demo format for executive audience
manages expectations about what a sprint review is and isn't
